calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-25-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Continued To Dec-11-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Oct-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Pop Physique, LLC, Jennifer Doige-Williams and Deric Williams.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-717-9768. Email: casey.giselle@gmail.com.

David Marcolini, Esq. specially appeared for plaintiff Gary Karrass, as Trustee of the Gary Karrass Trust Dated March 14, 2011.
No appearance by defendants Pop Physique, LLC, Gennifer Doige-Williams or Deric Williams. Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Lease, Commons Counts and Breach of Written Guaranty was filed on February 4, 2019 and personally served on defendant Pop Physique, LLC on February 19, 2019.
Substitute service on defendants Jennifer Doige-Williams and Deric Williams occurred on February 27, 2019 and was effectuated on March 11, 2019.
Default as to defendant Pop Physique, LLC was entered on April 22, 2019.
Default as to defendants Jennifer Doige-Williams and Deric Williams was entered on April 22, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on July 12, 2019.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Gary Karrass, as Trustee of the Gary Karrass Trust Dated March 14, 2011, and against the defaulted defendants Pop Physique, LLC, Jennifer Doige-Williams and Deric Williams, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $72,782.98.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,070.00.
Costs - $932.50.

Total - $75,785.48.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Hearing For Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Sep-17-2019 Continued To Oct-31-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2019 Continued To Nov-06-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
